File Information
Collection: TClinic API Collection
Environment: TClinic Local
Collection Description
Complete API test collection for TClinic - Clinic Management System ## Roles: - Admin: Full access - Doctor: Medical staff - Patient: Customers ## Setup: 1. Import this collection 2. Import the environment file 3. Run "Login Admin" first to get token 4. Other requests will auto-use the token

Total data received: 194.65KB
Average response time: 7ms
